title: Azure RBAC scopes, inheritance, and role definitions
description: Explains the management-group->subscription->resource-group->resource scope chain, downward inheritance, and Actions vs DataActions in role definitions.
body: Use when reasoning about effective Azure permissions. Do not conflate management-plane Actions with data-plane DataActions. Actions: remember scopes nest management-group->subscription->resource-group->resource and assignments inherit downward; a role definition lists Actions (control plane) and DataActions (data plane) with NotActions to subtract; effective access is the union of all assignments at and above the scope. Verify with Check Access. Validation signals include Check Access attributing access to a specific assignment and a DataAction gating data-plane calls. Risk boundary: assignments at management-group/subscription scope have wide reach and need review.
